description: Using the open food.gdt dataset, estimate three quantile regression models with 'food_exp' as the dependent variable and 'income' (plus a constant) as the regressor for tau values 0.25, 0.50, and 0.75. Save the full model outputs for all three regressions to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/quantreg_results.txt. Compare the slope coefficients for 'income' across the three quantiles and create a summary file at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/quantreg_summary.txt containing a single line stating which quantile (0.25, 0.50, or 0.75) has the largest estimated income effect.
